issue.title: Add SimplePie feed wrapper cache and transport gate

cases.focus: fetch_feed success through WP_SimplePie_File and deterministic loopback RSS2 response
fetch_feed collapses a one-element URL array before SimplePie initialization
fetch_feed multifeed clones SimplePie instances and merges loopback RSS/Atom items
WP HTTP failure maps through SimplePie into WP_Error(simplepie-error)
malformed loopback feed response maps into WP_Error(simplepie-error)
WP_Feed_Cache_Transient save/load/mtime miss and expiry behavior under deterministic site transient stubs
WP_SimplePie_File hands timeout, redirect, headers, and custom user-agent to Core HTTP and normalizes repeated headers
WP_SimplePie_Sanitize_KSES detects maybe-HTML, decodes base64, calls wp_kses_post, and preserves UTF-8 output

prerequisite_behavior_floors.role: RSS widget helper output and error-shape handoff floor
RSS block server renderer handoff floor
WP_SimplePie_File Core HTTP handoff and error mapping floor
class-simplepie/class-feed load-order and adapter class floor

blocked_conditions.reason: This gate only uses deterministic loopback URLs. External providers, redirects across public networks, throttling, robots policy, and provider-specific malformed feeds remain preserved-upstream fallback territory.
The local loopback server intentionally omits TLS, proxy negotiation, DNS failures, IPv6 routing, certificate validation, and corporate proxy behavior.
Site transients are deterministic in-memory stubs. Persistent object-cache backends, database-backed installed feed state, cache serialization upgrades, and multisite cache behavior are not claimed.

Widget and RSS block behavior is reconciled from existing deterministic PHP fixtures. Browser rendering, editor behavior, styles, interactivity, and installed dashboard/widget screens remain unclaimed.

Oracle and candidate roots both execute copied upstream SimplePie and WordPress wrapper files. No generated WPHX PHP wrapper, overlay manifest, host-primitive adapter, or copied artifact retirement is present.

required_before_retirement: generated original-path WordPress wrapper overlays for feed.php/class-simplepie/class-feed/cache/file/sanitize boundaries
SimplePie upstream-equivalent dependency provenance and license decision
ecosystem caller and replacement decision gate from WPHX-323.17
selected upstream PHPUnit feed-simplepie-core pass/pass with overlays
installed database-backed feed, widget, and block route evidence

non_claims: This gate does not implement or claim Haxe-owned SimplePie runtime logic.
This gate does not emit generated SimplePie wrappers or original-path public PHP replacements.
This gate does not retire copied SimplePie package files, class-simplepie.php, class-feed.php, feed.php, or WordPress feed adapter files.

This gate does not claim live external feed provider behavior, TLS, proxy, DNS, persistent object-cache, database-backed installed feed state, browser/editor widget or block parity, or installed WordPress feed parity.
The deterministic loopback server, PHP probe stubs, and copied roots are replacement-readiness evidence only, not distributable WPHX runtime code.
